org.apache.dubbo.registry

接口 Registry

  • 所有超级接口:
    Node, RegistryService
    所有已知子接口:
    Registry
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractRegistry, AbstractRegistry, ConsulRegistry, DubboRegistry, EtcdRegistry, FailbackRegistry, FailbackRegistry, ListenerRegistryWrapper, MulticastRegistry, MultipleRegistry, NacosRegistry, RedisRegistry, ServiceDiscoveryRegistry, SofaRegistry, ZookeeperRegistry

    public interface Registry
extends Node, RegistryService
    Registry. (SPI, Prototype, ThreadSafe)
    另请参阅:
    RegistryFactory.getRegistry(URL), AbstractRegistry

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 默认方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      default void reExportRegister(URL url) 
      default void reExportUnregister(URL url) 

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.common.Node

        destroy, getUrl, isAvailable

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.registry.RegistryService

        lookup, register, subscribe, unregister, unsubscribe

    • 方法详细资料

      • reExportRegister

        default void reExportRegister(URL url)

      • reExportUnregister

        default void reExportUnregister(URL url)
